title: Content Creator
text: Develop and manage multi-platform content (Facebook, TikTok, YouTube, Zalo OA…). Plan, organize, and optimize content to ensure consistency and effectiveness across channels.

title: SEO Content
text: Conduct keyword research and analyze search trends (Ahrefs, Google Trends), optimize content outlines, and implement SEO-optimized articles to enhance visibility and reach the right target audience.

title: Design
text: Design communication materials using Canva, ensuring visual consistency and alignment with brand identity and messaging.

title: Other skills
text: Possess additional supporting skills such as basic video editing, livestreaming, event coordination, and website design, enabling flexibility in content execution and operations.
